requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220–230 V / 50 Hz Type C/F Grid, GOST-TM Safety Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220–230V/50Hz C/F型插座电网，GOST-TM安全标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220–230V/50Hz C/F型插座電網，GOST-TM安全標準

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices with mains power supply or external power adapters sold in Turkmenistan must comply with electrical safety requirements for the Turkmenistan grid: 220–230 V AC, 50 Hz, using Type C (two-pin round Europlug) and Type F (Schuko) sockets. Electrical safety conformity is evaluated as part of the Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity and assessed against GOST-TM safety standards, which mirror the GOST-R electrical safety standards series (based on IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 equivalents for audio/video and IT equipment). Products must be tested and certified to confirm safe operation at 220–230 V/50 Hz. USB-powered or battery-only devices without mains input are generally lower risk but may still require Türkmenstandart conformity covering applicable safety aspects. Power plugs and adapters must be compatible with the Type C/F socket standard used throughout Turkmenistan.
summary.zh: 在土库曼斯坦销售的带有市电电源或外部电源适配器的无线及物联网设备，须符合土库曼斯坦电网的电气安全要求：220–230V交流电、50Hz，使用C型（两芯圆头欧式插头）及F型（Schuko）插座。电气安全合规作为Türkmenstandart合格证书的一部分进行评估，依据GOST-TM安全标准（与基于IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1等效标准的GOST-R电气安全标准系列相似，适用于视听及信息技术设备）。产品须经测试认证，确认在220–230V/50Hz下安全运行。仅使用USB供电或电池的设备一般风险较低，但仍可能须取得涵盖适用安全方面的Türkmenstandart合规认证。电源插头及适配器须与土库曼斯坦通用的C/F型插座标准兼容。
summary.zht: 在土庫曼銷售的帶有市電電源或外部電源適配器的無線及物聯網設備，須符合土庫曼電網的電氣安全要求：220–230V交流電、50Hz，使用C型（兩芯圓頭歐式插頭）及F型（Schuko）插座。電氣安全合規作為Türkmenstandart合格證書的一部分進行評估，依據GOST-TM安全標準（與基於IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1等效標準的GOST-R電氣安全標準系列相似，適用於視聽及信息技術設備）。產品須經測試認證，確認在220–230V/50Hz下安全運行。僅使用USB供電或電池的設備一般風險較低，但仍可能須取得涵蓋適用安全方面的Türkmenstandart合規認證。電源插頭及適配器須與土庫曼通用的C/F型插座標準相容。

standards_or_laws: GOST-TM electrical safety standards — Turkmenistan national standards mirroring GOST-R series for low-voltage equipment and audio/video/IT equipment safety (IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 equivalents)
Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity — mandatory for products with electrical safety scope sold in Turkmenistan
Turkmenistan power supply standard: 220–230 V AC / 50 Hz, Type C and Type F (Schuko) sockets
Law of Turkmenistan 'On Conformity Assessment' — establishes mandatory conformity certification for electrical and electronic products

summary.en: Chinese electrical products with mains power are subject to CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mandatory safety certification covering electrical safety, administered by CNCA. The applicable Chinese standard for audio/video and IT equipment is GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1), replacing the earlier GB 8898 for audio equipment and GB 4943 for IT equipment. Chinese products are designed for the 220 V/50 Hz grid (China uses a 220 V system), so voltage compatibility with Turkmenistan's 220–230 V/50 Hz grid is generally maintained. However, Chinese plugs (Type A, I, or the flat two-pin used in China) are not compatible with Turkmenistan's Type C/F sockets, requiring an adapter or plug replacement for the Turkmen market. Chinese CCC safety certification is not recognised by Türkmenstandart.
summary.zh: 带有市电电源的中国电气产品须取得国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的强制性安全认证（CCC），涵盖电气安全。视听及信息技术设备适用的中国标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1等效），取代了早期的音频设备GB 8898和IT设备GB 4943。中国产品设计用于220V/50Hz电网（中国使用220V系统），因此与土库曼斯坦220–230V/50Hz电网的电压兼容性通常能得到保证。但是，中国插头（A型、I型或中国使用的扁两脚）与土库曼斯坦的C/F型插座不兼容，进入土库曼斯坦市场须使用转换器或更换插头。中国CCC安全认证不被Türkmenstandart承认。
summary.zht: 帶有市電電源的中國電氣產品須取得國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的強制性安全認證（CCC），涵蓋電氣安全。視聽及信息技術設備適用的中國標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1等效），取代了早期的音頻設備GB 8898和IT設備GB 4943。中國產品設計用於220V/50Hz電網（中國使用220V系統），因此與土庫曼220–230V/50Hz電網的電壓相容性通常能得到保證。但是，中國插頭（A型、I型或中國使用的扁兩腳）與土庫曼的C/F型插座不相容，進入土庫曼市場須使用轉換器或更換插頭。中國CCC安全認證不被Türkmenstandart承認。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory electrical safety certification for regulated products sold in China
GB 4943.1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (IEC 62368-1 equivalent)
GB 8898 — Safety requirements for audio, video and similar electronic apparatus (superseded by GB 4943.1 for most categories)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by Türkmenstandart. Electrical safety testing to GOST-TM standards at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory is required as part of the Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity. While voltage levels are compatible (both 220 V/50 Hz), Chinese plug types (Type A, I) are incompatible with Turkmenistan's Type C/F sockets — products must be fitted with Type C or Type F compliant plugs or adapters for the Turkmen market. Power adapter labelling and safety markings must reference applicable GOST-TM standards rather than Chinese GB or European CE standards.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证不被Türkmenstandart承认。须在土库曼认可实验室按GOST-TM标准进行电气安全测试，作为Türkmenstandart合格证书的一部分。尽管电压等级兼容（均为220V/50Hz），中国插头类型（A型、I型）与土库曼斯坦C/F型插座不兼容——产品须为土库曼市场配备符合C型或F型要求的插头或适配器。电源适配器标签及安全标志须参照适用的GOST-TM标准，而非中国GB标准或欧洲CE标准。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證不被Türkmenstandart承認。須在土庫曼認可實驗室按GOST-TM標準進行電氣安全測試，作為Türkmenstandart合格證書的一部分。儘管電壓等級相容（均為220V/50Hz），中國插頭類型（A型、I型）與土庫曼C/F型插座不相容——產品須為土庫曼市場配備符合C型或F型要求的插頭或適配器。電源適配器標籤及安全標誌須參照適用的GOST-TM標準，而非中國GB標準或歐洲CE標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GOST-TM electrical safety conformity (as part of Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity) required for mains-powered wireless devices; Type C/F plug compatibility required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC electrical safety certification under GB 4943.1 required for mains-powered devices sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GOST-TM electrical safety certification via Türkmenstandart is mandatory for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Turkmenistan. Chinese CCC is not recognised. Voltage is compatible (220 V/50 Hz) but Chinese plug types are incompatible with Turkmenistan's Type C/F sockets — plug adaptation is required. Testing at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory and GOST-TM-referenced safety markings are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过Türkmenstandart的GOST-TM电气安全认证对在土库曼斯坦销售的市电供电无线及物联网设备为强制要求。中国CCC不被承认。电压兼容（220V/50Hz），但中国插头类型与土库曼斯坦C/F型插座不兼容——须进行插头适配。须在土库曼认可实验室测试并使用参照GOST-TM标准的安全标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過Türkmenstandart的GOST-TM電氣安全認證對在土庫曼銷售的市電供電無線及物聯網設備為強制要求。中國CCC不被承認。電壓相容（220V/50Hz），但中國插頭類型與土庫曼C/F型插座不相容——須進行插頭適配。須在土庫曼認可實驗室測試並使用參照GOST-TM標準的安全標誌。
